strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js, TypeScript, and React
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms era)
No mention of Vitest specifically, though testing background is strong
response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years requirement with deep full-stack experience in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role. Engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD) and architecture exposure align well with the role. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and modern Kotlin are minor and easily bridged given the breadth of polyglot experience.
